title: Life Bay View Private Hospital voted as trusted healthcare provider
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Life Bay View Private...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Life Bay View Private Hospital is honoured to have been recognised in the Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice Award 2025.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Life Bay View Private Hospital is honoured to have been recognised in the Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice Award 2025."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"As a leading multidisciplinary private hospital providing patient-centred care to the community of Mossel Bay and surrounds, we are grateful for this recognition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We extend our appreciation to readers for acknowledging our delivery of quality care and clinical excellence which contributes to making life better for our community.","html":"We extend our appreciation to readers for acknowledging our delivery of quality care and clinical excellence which contributes to making life better for our community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our values of personal care and performance pride are entrenched in our business, ensuring that we live our purpose of making life better.","html":"Our values of personal care and performance pride are entrenched in our business, ensuring that we live our purpose of making life better."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We are proudly supported by a team of specialists, including cardiologists in our state-of-the-art catheterisation laboratory, specialist physicians, nephrologist, neurologist, neurosurgeons, cardiothoracic surgeons, obstetricians, gynaecologists, uro-gynaecologist, urologists, ENT specialist, paediatricians and orthopaedic and general surgeons, as well as dedicated nurses and support teams, allied healthcare professionals and ancillary services.","html":"We are proudly supported by a team of specialists, including cardiologists in our state-of-the-art catheterisation laboratory, specialist physicians, nephrologist, neurologist, neurosurgeons, cardiothoracic surgeons, obstetricians, gynaecologists, uro-gynaecologist, urologists, ENT specialist, paediatricians and orthopaedic and general surgeons, as well as dedicated nurses and support teams, allied healthcare professionals and ancillary services."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Continuous investment in our people, technology and infrastructure, including ongoing consultation with stakeholders and the growing community, ensures that the hospital provides world-class patient-centered care.","html":"Continuous investment in our people, technology and infrastructure, including ongoing consultation with stakeholders and the growing community, ensures that the hospital provides world-class patient-centered care."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Life Bay View Private Hospital has been serving the community for the past 28 years and looks forward to providing quality healthcare for many years to come.","html":"Life Bay View Private Hospital has been serving the community for the past 28 years and looks forward to providing quality healthcare for many years to come."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We believe that the provision of patient-centred healthcare to the community contributes to the sustainability of Mossel Bay and to it being a destination of choice.","html":"We believe that the provision of patient-centred healthcare to the community contributes to the sustainability of Mossel Bay and to it being a destination of choice."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"For more information about our services, contact the hospital’s marketing and communications co-ordinator, Nancy Ekkerd, on 044 601 1912."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"About Life Healthcare GroupLife Healthcare is a global people-centred, diversified healthcare organisation listed on the Johannesburg Stock Exchange.","html":"About Life Healthcare Group
Life Healthcare is a global people-centred, diversified healthcare organisation listed on the Johannesburg Stock Exchange."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Life Healthcare has over 40 years’ experience in the South African private healthcare sector, and currently operates 64 healthcare facilities in southern Africa.","html":"Life Healthcare has over 40 years’ experience in the South African private healthcare sector, and currently operates 64 healthcare facilities in southern Africa."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Services include acute hospital care, acute physical rehabilitation, acute mental healthcare, renal dialysis, oncology, diagnostic and molecular imaging and health risk management services, which include occupational health and wellness services.","html":"Services include acute hospital care, acute physical rehabilitation, acute mental healthcare, renal dialysis, oncology, diagnostic and molecular imaging and health risk management services, which include occupational health and wellness services."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Visit: https://www.lifehealthcare.co.za"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
